scenario.title: Good First Issue: Add Chinese (zh-CN) translation of README.md
scenario.description: A complete walkthrough of a Ring-3 (Good First Issue) contribution lifecycle, from issue discovery to PR merge, demonstrating the automated CI/CD pipeline and human-in-the-loop review.

steps.label: 发现 Issue
steps.description: Agent scans the repository for open issues and finds #191 labeled 'good first issue'.

steps.label: 留言 /claim
steps.description: Contributor comments /claim on the issue to lock a 4-hour exclusive implementation window.

steps.label: Bot 欢迎
steps.description: newbie-welcome.yml workflow auto-replies with a newcomer guide, including contribution steps and star prompt.

steps.label: Fork & 开发
steps.description: Contributor forks the repo, creates a feature branch, implements the changes with git commit -s (Signed-off-by).

steps.label: 提交 PR
steps.description: Contributor pushes the branch and opens a Pull Request. CI workflows are triggered automatically.

steps.label: DCO 检查
steps.description: dco-check.yml validates that every commit includes a Signed-off-by trailer. If missing, github-actions[bot] posts a structured remediation comment with exact git commands.
steps.on_failure: Bot posts remediation: git rebase --signoff + git push --force

steps.label: CI 审计
steps.description: pr-checks.yml runs the full audit suite: Agent Quality Score, PR size check, pytest + coverage, Shadow Branch isolation, Auto-Merge Gate.

checks.name: Shadow Branch Isolation
checks.description: External code evaluated in isolated branch

steps.label: 合并 🎉
steps.description: Human maintainer reviews and merges the PR. Auto-Merge Gate enables automatic merge when all conditions are met.

metadata.description: Machine-readable scenario manifest for AI agents. Parsed by autonomous agents to understand MisakaNet's contribution lifecycle.
